title: GitHub - stupside/castor: Point it at any web page and it finds the video, extracts the stream, transcodes it and casts in real time to your TV. It even burns subtitles….
excerpt: Point it at any web page and it finds the video, extracts the stream, transcodes it and casts in real time to your TV. It even burns subtitles…. - stupside/castor
content_html:
Smart TVs won't cast arbitrary web video, and screen mirroring is laggy and drops resolution. Castor casts the real stream instead, at full quality, from your terminal.

Point Castor at a web page you are watching, or at a direct stream URL, and it finds the video, extracts the stream, transcodes it for your TV, and casts in real time. It can also resolve an IMDB/TMDB id against sources you configure yourself, and burn in auto-generated subtitles.

To extract, it launches headless Chrome and watches network traffic over the Chrome DevTools Protocol, then runs a short action pipeline to start playback: click the page, navigate into the largest iframe, and click again as a fallback. This works on pages that allow automated playback, and won't work everywhere.

A general-purpose casting tool: it casts only what you point it at. See Purpose and disclaimer.


Run castor cast to browse titles and cast, without leaving the terminal.

Installation

The recommended way to run Castor is the native binary. It runs directly on your machine, so it shares your TV's network (required for device discovery). It requires Chrome/Chromium (headless extraction), ffmpeg (transcoding), and ffprobe (format detection) on your PATH. A Linux-only Docker image that bundles all three is also available.

Homebrew (macOS)

brew install --cask stupside/tap/castor

From source

Needs Go 1.26+ and cmake (the whisper.cpp bindings are cgo and link a locally built libwhisper.a):

git clone --recurse-submodules https://github.com/stupside/castor.git
cd castor
make          # builds libwhisper.a, then the castor binary

go install won't work: the vendored whisper.cpp bindings come in through a local replace and need that prebuilt static lib.

Quick start

Tell Castor which TV to use: find its name with castor scan and put it in config.yaml.

device:
  name: "Living Room TV"   # exact name from `castor scan`
  type: dlna

Now cast a page you are watching, or a stream URL you have:

castor cast player https://example.com/watch/some-video

For the interactive browser, which searches titles and casts them for you, add a TMDB key and a source (see Configuration), then run castor cast:

Run castor --help for every command and its flags.

Configuration

Castor reads config.yaml from the current directory, or the path passed to --config. The only required key is the device to cast to (shown in Quick start); everything mechanical (timeouts, probing, capture, transcoding, network interface, Chrome discovery) has working defaults. Keep secrets out of the committed file: put them in a git-ignored config.local.yaml that overlays it, or in CASTOR_SECTION__FIELD environment variables. See SECURITY.md.

Sources

cast movie, cast episode, and the interactive browser resolve a title id against sources you configure. Castor bundles none, so add your own (sites you are authorized to use). There is no catalog and no lookup: Castor substitutes the id into the templates you write, prefixes each of your proxies, and opens the resulting page, then extracts the stream exactly like cast player. For example, castor cast movie tt12300742 opens https://your-source.example/embed/movie/tt12300742.

sources:
  - proxies: ["https://your-source.example"]   # base URLs, tried in order
    templates:
      movie: "/embed/movie/{itemID}"
      episode: "/embed/tv/{itemID}/{season}-{episode}"

TMDB

The interactive browser (castor cast) uses a TMDB API key to search titles; direct commands like cast movie <id> do not need it. Get a free key from themoviedb.org and keep it in config.local.yaml:

tmdb:
  api_key: "<KEY>"

Subtitles

Auto-generated subtitles, transcribed with whisper and burned into the video. Off by default:

whisper:
  enable: true             # off by default
  # language: "fr"         # default: English
  # model_path: ""         # default: ggml-tiny.en (~75 MB, auto-downloaded)

Supported devices

DLNA / UPnP

Any TV implementing the DLNA/UPnP MediaRenderer:1 profile works, which covers virtually every smart TV sold in the last decade: Samsung (tested), LG, Sony Bravia, Panasonic Viera, Philips, Hisense, TCL, VIZIO, Sharp. Networked players like Kodi, VLC, and Plex also work. Run castor scan to list what is on your network.

Chromecast

Experimental: implemented but untested. Contributions welcome.

Docker (optional)

A Linux-only alternative that bundles Chrome, ffmpeg, and ffprobe.

Warning

Docker can only reach your TV from a Linux host on the same LAN. Discovery uses SSDP multicast and the TV streams back from Castor's replay server, and neither survives Docker's bridge network, so --network host is required. On Docker Desktop (macOS/Windows) that flag is a silent no-op: the container lands on Docker Desktop's internal VM subnet (e.g. 192.168.65.x) instead of your LAN, so scan finds nothing and cast fails with device "…" (type dlna) not found. Run the native binary on macOS/Windows instead, or bridge a Linux VM onto your LAN (e.g. Lima + socket_vmnet).

On a Linux box or NAS on the same network as the TV, the prebuilt ghcr.io/stupside/castor image saves you installing the dependencies by hand:

# Discover devices (no config required)
docker run --rm --network host ghcr.io/stupside/castor:latest scan

# Cast, mounting config.yaml and a persistent model cache
docker run --rm --network host \
  -v "$PWD/config.yaml:/config.yaml" \
  -v castor-cache:/root/.cache \
  ghcr.io/stupside/castor:latest \
  cast player https://example.com/watch/some-video

The container reads config from config.yaml at /config.yaml, so run every command from the directory holding it. The castor-cache volume keeps the auto-downloaded whisper models between runs; swap :latest for any release tag to pin a version.

Note

DLNA passthrough and hardware encoding. When the TV can already play the source video (H.264 inside a profile and level it accepts), Castor stream-copies it instead of re-encoding, dropping CPU use to near zero. When a re-encode is unavoidable (a codec the TV rejects, or burned-in subtitles), Castor picks a hardware H.264 encoder if one actually works on the host (VA-API on an Intel Linux box, VideoToolbox on the native macOS binary) and otherwise falls back to software libx264. To let the Docker container reach an Intel GPU for VA-API, add --device /dev/dri to docker run (the --network host flag alone does not expose the GPU); without it, or on a host with no working hardware encoder, Castor stays on libx264.

Purpose and disclaimer

Castor is a general-purpose caster, not a service tied to any particular site.

  • It hosts nothing. No bundled video, catalog, or sources: Castor casts only a page, stream URL, or source you supply and are authorized to use, much like a Chromecast.
  • It does not touch DRM. Castor does not decrypt or circumvent DRM, and cannot cast DRM-protected services.
  • Using it lawfully is your responsibility. Whether a site's terms of use and your local law allow what you do with Castor is on you. Do not use it to infringe copyright.

Castor is provided as-is for lawful, personal, and educational use.

Contributing

See CONTRIBUTING.md.

sentences.zh: 智能电视不会投射任意网络视频，并且屏幕镜像很滞后并且会降低分辨率。

sentences.en: Castor casts the real stream instead, at full quality, from your terminal.
sentences.zh: Castor 会从您的终端以全质量投射真实流。

sentences.en: It can also resolve an IMDB/TMDB id against sources you configure yourself, and burn in auto-generated subtitles.
sentences.zh: 它还可以根据您自己配置的源解析 IMDB/TMDB ID，并刻录自动生成的字幕。

sentences.en: This works on pages that allow automated playback, and won't work everywhere.

blocks.html_en: Docker can only reach your TV from a Linux host on the same LAN. Discovery uses SSDP multicast and the TV streams back from Castor's replay server, and neither survives Docker's bridge network, so --network host is required. On Docker Desktop (macOS/Windows) that flag is a silent no-op: the container lands on Docker Desktop's internal VM subnet (e.g. 192.168.65.x) instead of your LAN, so scan finds nothing and cast fails with device "…" (type dlna) not found. Run the native binary on macOS/Windows instead, or bridge a Linux VM onto your LAN (e.g. Lima + socket_vmnet).

sentences.en: Docker can only reach your TV from a Linux host on the same LAN.
sentences.zh: Docker 只能从同一 LAN 上的 Linux 主机访问您的电视。

sentences.en: Discovery uses SSDP multicast and the TV streams back from Castor's replay server, and neither survives Docker's bridge network, so --network host is required.
sentences.zh: Discovery 使用 SSDP 多播，电视流从 Castor 的重播服务器返回，两者都无法在 Docker 的桥接网络中幸存，因此需要 --network host。

sentences.en: On Docker Desktop (macOS/Windows) that flag is a silent no-op: the container lands on Docker Desktop's internal VM subnet (e.g. 192.168.65.x) instead of your LAN, so scan finds nothing and cast fails with device "…"
sentences.zh: 在 Docker Desktop (macOS/Windows) 上，该标志是静默无操作：容器落在 Docker Desktop 的内部 VM 子网（例如 192.168.65.x）而不是 LAN 上，因此扫描找不到任何内容，并且转换失败，并显示设备“...”

sentences.en: (type dlna) not found.
sentences.zh: （类型 dlna）未找到。

sentences.en: Run the native binary on macOS/Windows instead, or bridge a Linux VM onto your LAN (e.g. Lima + socket_vmnet).
sentences.zh: 相反，请在 macOS/Windows 上运行本机二进制文件，或将 Linux VM 桥接到 LAN 上（例如 Lima + socket_vmnet）。

blocks.html_en: On a Linux box or NAS on the same network as the TV, the prebuilt ghcr.io/stupside/castor image saves you installing the dependencies by hand:

sentences.en: On a Linux box or NAS on the same network as the TV, the prebuilt ghcr.io/stupside/castor image saves you installing the dependencies by hand:
sentences.zh: 在与电视位于同一网络的 Linux 盒子或 NAS 上，预构建的 ghcr.io/stupside/castor 映像可以帮助您手动安装依赖项：

blocks.html_en: The container reads config from config.yaml at /config.yaml, so run every command from the directory holding it. The castor-cache volume keeps the auto-downloaded whisper models between runs; swap :latest for any release tag to pin a version.

sentences.en: The container reads config from config.yaml at /config.yaml, so run every command from the directory holding it.
sentences.zh: 容器从 /config.yaml 处的 config.yaml 读取配置，因此从包含它的目录运行每个命令。

sentences.en: The castor-cache volume keeps the auto-downloaded whisper models between runs; swap :latest for any release tag to pin a version.
sentences.zh: Castor 缓存卷在运行之间保留自动下载的耳语模型； swap :latest 用于任何版本标记以固定版本。

blocks.html_en: Note

DLNA passthrough and hardware encoding. When the TV can already play the source video (H.264 inside a profile and level it accepts), Castor stream-copies it instead of re-encoding, dropping CPU use to near zero. When a re-encode is unavoidable (a codec the TV rejects, or burned-in subtitles), Castor picks a hardware H.264 encoder if one actually works on the host (VA-API on an Intel Linux box, VideoToolbox on the native macOS binary) and otherwise falls back to software libx264. To let the Docker container reach an Intel GPU for VA-API, add --device /dev/dri to docker run (the --network host flag alone does not expose the GPU); without it, or on a host with no working hardware encoder, Castor stays on libx264.

sentences.en: DLNA passthrough and hardware encoding.
sentences.zh: DLNA 直通和硬件编码。

sentences.en: When the TV can already play the source video (H.264 inside a profile and level it accepts), Castor stream-copies it instead of re-encoding, dropping CPU use to near zero.
sentences.zh: 当电视已经可以播放源视频（配置文件内的 H.264 及其接受的级别）时，Castor 会对其进行流复制而不是重新编码，从而将 CPU 使用率降低到接近零。

sentences.en: When a re-encode is unavoidable (a codec the TV rejects, or burned-in subtitles), Castor picks a hardware H.264 encoder if one actually works on the host (VA-API on an Intel Linux box, VideoToolbox on the native macOS binary) and otherwise falls back to software libx264.
sentences.zh: 当重新编码不可避免时（电视拒绝的编解码器或内置字幕），如果硬件 H.264 编码器实际上可以在主机上运行（Intel Linux 盒子上的 VA-API，本机 macOS 二进制文件上的 VideoToolbox），Castor 会选择硬件 H.264 编码器，否则会回退到软件 libx264。

sentences.en: To let the Docker container reach an Intel GPU for VA-API, add --device /dev/dri to docker run (the --network host flag alone does not expose the GPU); without it, or on a host with no working hardware encoder, Castor stays on libx264.
sentences.zh: 要让 Docker 容器访问 VA-API 的 Intel GPU，请将 --device /dev/dri 添加到 docker run（仅 --network 主机标志不会公开 GPU）；如果没有它，或者在没有可用硬件编码器的主机上，Castor 会停留在 libx264 上。

blocks.html_en: Purpose and disclaimer

sentences.en: Purpose and disclaimer
sentences.zh: 目的及免责声明

blocks.html_en: Castor is a general-purpose caster, not a service tied to any particular site.

sentences.en: Castor is a general-purpose caster, not a service tied to any particular site.
sentences.zh: Castor 是一种通用脚轮，不是与任何特定站点绑定的服务。

blocks.html_en: • It hosts nothing. No bundled video, catalog, or sources: Castor casts only a page, stream URL, or source you supply and are authorized to use, much like a Chromecast.

sentences.en: It hosts nothing.
sentences.zh: 它什么也不承载。

sentences.en: No bundled video, catalog, or sources: Castor casts only a page, stream URL, or source you supply and are authorized to use, much like a Chromecast.
sentences.zh: 没有捆绑的视频、目录或来源：Castor 仅投射您提供并有权使用的页面、流 URL 或来源，就像 Chromecast 一样。

blocks.html_en: • It does not touch DRM. Castor does not decrypt or circumvent DRM, and cannot cast DRM-protected services.

sentences.en: It does not touch DRM.
sentences.zh: 它不涉及 DRM。

sentences.en: Castor does not decrypt or circumvent DRM, and cannot cast DRM-protected services.
sentences.zh: Castor 不会解密或规避 DRM，并且无法投射受 DRM 保护的服务。

blocks.html_en: • Using it lawfully is your responsibility. Whether a site's terms of use and your local law allow what you do with Castor is on you. Do not use it to infringe copyright.

sentences.en: Using it lawfully is your responsibility.
sentences.zh: 合法使用它是您的责任。

sentences.en: Whether a site's terms of use and your local law allow what you do with Castor is on you.
sentences.zh: 网站的使用条款和您当地的法律是否允许您使用 Castor 进行操作取决于您。

sentences.en: Do not use it to infringe copyright.
sentences.zh: 请勿使用它来侵犯版权。

blocks.html_en: Castor is provided as-is for lawful, personal, and educational use.

sentences.en: Castor is provided as-is for lawful, personal, and educational use.
sentences.zh: Castor 按原样提供，用于合法、个人和教育用途。

blocks.html_en: Contributing

sentences.en: Contributing
sentences.zh: 贡献

blocks.html_en: See CONTRIBUTING.md.

sentences.en: See CONTRIBUTING.md.
sentences.zh: 请参阅 CONTRIBUTING.md。

content_html_zh:
智能电视不会投射任意网络视频，并且屏幕镜像很滞后并且会降低分辨率。 Castor 会从您的终端以全质量投射真实流。

将 Castor 指向您正在观看的网页或直接流 URL，它会找到视频、提取流、为您的电视转码并实时投射。 它还可以根据您自己配置的源解析 IMDB/TMDB ID，并刻录自动生成的字幕。

为了提取，它会启动无头 Chrome 并通过 Chrome DevTools 协议监视网络流量，然后运行一个简短的操作管道来开始播放：单击页面，导航到最大的 iframe，然后再次单击作为后备。 这适用于允许自动播放的页面，但不适用于所有地方。

通用铸造工具：它仅铸造您指向的内容。 请参阅目的和免责声明。

运行 Castor Cast 即可浏览标题并进行投射，而无需离开终端。

安装

运行 Castor 的推荐方法是本机二进制文件。 它直接在您的计算机上运行，​​因此它共享您的电视网络（设备发现所需）。 它需要 PATH 上的 Chrome/Chromium（无头提取）、ffmpeg（转码）和 ffprobe（格式检测）。 还提供了捆绑所有三个的仅限 Linux 的 Docker 映像。

自制软件 (macOS)

brew install --cask stupside/tap/castor

从源头

需要 Go 1.26+ 和 cmake（whisper.cpp 绑定是 cgo 并链接本地构建的 libwhisper.a）：

git clone --recurse-submodules https://github.com/stupside/castor.git
cd castor
make          # builds libwhisper.a, then the castor binary

go install 不起作用：供应商的 Whisper.cpp 绑定通过本地替换进入，并且需要预构建的静态库。

快速启动

告诉 Castor 使用哪台电视：使用 Castor scan 找到其名称并将其放入 config.yaml 中。

device:
  name: "Living Room TV"   # exact name from `castor scan`
  type: dlna

现在投射您正在观看的页面或您拥有的流 URL：

castor cast player https://example.com/watch/some-video

对于交互式浏览器，它会搜索标题并为您投射它们，请添加 TMDB 密钥和源（请参阅配置），然后运行 ​​Castor Cast：

对每个命令及其标志运行castor --help。

配置

Castor 从当前目录或传递给 --config 的路径读取 config.yaml。 唯一需要的键是要投射到的设备（如快速启动所示）；所有机械操作（超时、探测、捕获、转码、网络接口、Chrome 发现）都有工作默认值。 将秘密放在提交的文件之外：将它们放在覆盖它的 git-ignored config.local.yaml 中，或放在 CASTOR_SECTION__FIELD 环境变量中。 请参阅 SECURITY.md。

来源

演员阵容电影、演员阵容和交互式浏览器根据您配置的源解析标题 ID。 Castor 不捆绑任何内容，因此请添加您自己的（您有权使用的网站）。 没有目录，也没有查找：Castor 将 id 替换到您编写的模板中，为每个代理添加前缀，然后打开结果页面，然后像 Cast Player 一样提取流。 例如，castorcast movie tt12300742 将打开 https://your-source.example/embed/movie/tt12300742。

sources:
  - proxies: ["https://your-source.example"]   # base URLs, tried in order
    templates:
      movie: "/embed/movie/{itemID}"
      episode: "/embed/tv/{itemID}/{season}-{episode}"

TMDB

交互式浏览器（castorcast）使用 TMDB API 密钥来搜索标题；像cast movie <id> 这样的直接命令不需要它。 从 themoviedb.org 获取免费密钥并将其保存在 config.local.yaml 中：

tmdb:
  api_key: "<KEY>"

字幕

自动生成的字幕，以耳语转录并刻录到视频中。 默认关闭：

whisper:
  enable: true             # off by default
  # language: "fr"         # default: English
  # model_path: ""         # default: ggml-tiny.en (~75 MB, auto-downloaded)

支持的设备

DLNA/UPnP

任何实施 DLNA/UPnP MediaRenderer:1 配置文件的电视都可以工作，几乎涵盖了过去十年中销售的所有智能电视：三星（经过测试）、LG、索尼 Bravia、松下 Viera、飞利浦、海信、TCL、VIZIO、夏普。 Kodi、VLC 和 Plex 等网络播放器也可以使用。 运行 Castor Scan 以列出网络上的内容。

Chromecast

实验性：已实施但未经测试。 欢迎贡献。

码头工人（可选）

仅限 Linux 的替代方案，捆绑了 Chrome、ffmpeg 和 ffprobe。

警告

Docker 只能从同一 LAN 上的 Linux 主机访问您的电视。 Discovery 使用 SSDP 多播，电视流从 Castor 的重播服务器返回，两者都无法在 Docker 的桥接网络中幸存，因此需要 --network host。 在 Docker Desktop (macOS/Windows) 上，该标志是静默无操作：容器落在 Docker Desktop 的内部 VM 子网（例如 192.168.65.x）而不是 LAN 上，因此扫描找不到任何内容，并且转换失败，并显示设备“...” （类型 dlna）未找到。 相反，请在 macOS/Windows 上运行本机二进制文件，或将 Linux VM 桥接到 LAN 上（例如 Lima + socket_vmnet）。

在与电视位于同一网络的 Linux 盒子或 NAS 上，预构建的 ghcr.io/stupside/castor 映像可以帮助您手动安装依赖项：

# Discover devices (no config required)
docker run --rm --network host ghcr.io/stupside/castor:latest scan

# Cast, mounting config.yaml and a persistent model cache
docker run --rm --network host \
  -v "$PWD/config.yaml:/config.yaml" \
  -v castor-cache:/root/.cache \
  ghcr.io/stupside/castor:latest \
  cast player https://example.com/watch/some-video

容器从 /config.yaml 处的 config.yaml 读取配置，因此从包含它的目录运行每个命令。 Castor 缓存卷在运行之间保留自动下载的耳语模型； swap :latest 用于任何版本标记以固定版本。

Note

DLNA 直通和硬件编码。 当电视已经可以播放源视频（配置文件内的 H.264 及其接受的级别）时，Castor 会对其进行流复制而不是重新编码，从而将 CPU 使用率降低到接近零。 当重新编码不可避免时（电视拒绝的编解码器或内置字幕），如果硬件 H.264 编码器实际上可以在主机上运行（Intel Linux 盒子上的 VA-API，本机 macOS 二进制文件上的 VideoToolbox），Castor 会选择硬件 H.264 编码器，否则会回退到软件 libx264。 要让 Docker 容器访问 VA-API 的 Intel GPU，请将 --device /dev/dri 添加到 docker run（仅 --network 主机标志不会公开 GPU）；如果没有它，或者在没有可用硬件编码器的主机上，Castor 会停留在 libx264 上。

目的及免责声明

Castor 是一种通用脚轮，不是与任何特定站点绑定的服务。

  • 它什么也不承载。 没有捆绑的视频、目录或来源：Castor 仅投射您提供并有权使用的页面、流 URL 或来源，就像 Chromecast 一样。
  • 它不涉及 DRM。 Castor 不会解密或规避 DRM，并且无法投射受 DRM 保护的服务。
  • 合法使用它是您的责任。 网站的使用条款和您当地的法律是否允许您使用 Castor 进行操作取决于您。 请勿使用它来侵犯版权。

Castor 按原样提供，用于合法、个人和教育用途。

贡献

请参阅 CONTRIBUTING.md。
